name: Custom Discord Bot
long_description:
🤖 Custom Discord Bot

• Get a fully personalized bot for your Discord server.
• Features include:
  - Moderation tools
  - Auto role assignment
  - Logging and analytics
  - Giveaways
  - File delivery
  - Scraping, API calls, automation
• Designed per your exact needs — flexible & scalable.

Pricing: From $5 to $15 depending on features
Contact: @fmpChatBot

name: Custom Telegram Bot
long_description:
